title: Property Consultant - Puravankara International Enterprises - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Puravankara International Enterprises - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
We at Puravankara International Enterprises are looking for an experienced Property Consultant based out of Srinagar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Puravankara International Enterprises:
Puravankara International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Puravankara International Enterprises!
